fundamentals.long_business_summary: Safety Controls & Devices Limited engaged in the engineering, procurement, and construction business in India. The company engages in the installation of substations, construction of solar plants, installation of firefighting equipment, construction of hospital. It operates in multiple sectors including transmission and distribution, solar energy, EV charging infrastructure, fire protection systems, and hospital construction. It engages in designing, engineering, supplying, installing, erecting, testing, and commissioning transmission substations. The company caters to government entities and undertakings including various state and central government power utilities, private power entities, and renewable energy developers. The company engages in design, engineering, supply, erection, testing, and commissioning of transmission substations. Additionally, the company operates in the renewable energy sector by constructing solar power plants; fire protection business, to ensure safety and compliance of industrial, commercial, and residential spaces; and the healthcare sector, for the construction of hospitals. Safety Controls & Devices Limited was founded in 1997 and is based in Lucknow, India.
